## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for all changed behaviour
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No new `any` type assertions (TypeScript)
- [ ] `cargo fmt` and `cargo clippy` pass (Rust)
- [ ] No personal data or secrets committed
- [ ] PR title follows conventional commits format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
